rules_applied: inboundAddressRule: Nice Ass says bare 'Trusty' → must be 'Trouwtje' (narrow scope)
inboundAddressRule: any 'Trusty Ass' full form → canonical 'Trouwe Ezel'
pronounRule: u → jou for Trusty Ass's own speech (light/tussentaal/jij-je)
placeholderLeakFix: '(Trusty Ass)' wrapper left by unresolved substitution
